executives.name: Angela Braly
executives.background: Former Chairman, President, and CEO of WellPoint, Inc. (now Elevance Health).

executives.name: Brett Biggs
executives.background: Former Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of Walmart Inc. Director since 2022.

executives.name: Craig Arnold
executives.background: Craig Arnold is Chairman and Chief Executive Officer of Eaton. He was appointed Chairman and CEO on June 1, 2016. Previously, he served as President and Chief Operating Officer of Eaton and as Vice Chairman and Chief Operating Officer of the Industrial Sector. He joined Eaton in 2000 as Senior Vice President and Group Executive of the Fluid Power Group. Prior to Eaton, he held various leadership positions at General Electric.

executives.name: Dipak Golechha
executives.background: Dipak Golechha has served as our Chief Financial Officer since March 2021. Prior to joining us, Mr. Golechha served as President of Palo Alto Networks from December 2020 to March 2021. Previously, he was CEO of Excelitas Technologies Corp. and held various executive roles at Procter & Gamble.

executives.name: Margaret Whitman
executives.background: U.S. Ambassador to Kenya; former CEO of Hewlett Packard Enterprise.

executives.name: William Gipson
executives.background: Retired President, Enterprise Packaging Transformation, The Procter & Gamble Company.

tenure_dates.title: Former President, Enterprise Packaging Transformation & Chief Diversity and Inclusion Officer
